title: Ocean God - Hellenistic Mosaic (AI Animated)
image_prompt: A highly detailed Hellenistic floor mosaic depicting the ocean god Poseidon surrounded by sea creatures, made of thousands of tiny colored stone tesserae
video_prompt: Subtle animation: the tesserae shimmering as if underwater, gentle caustics and light rays moving across the mosaic surface, very slow zoom out

title: Misty Mountains - Sumi-e Ink Wash (AI Animated)
image_prompt: A breathtaking Edo period Sumi-e ink wash painting of misty mountains with a small solitary figure walking on a winding path, elegant brush strokes, minimalist composition
video_prompt: Subtle animation: mist slowly rolling through the mountains, gentle breeze moving the trees, ink spreading effect, very calm and meditative

title: Gothic Marketplace - Illuminated Manuscript (AI Animated)
image_prompt: A detailed and intricate Gothic Illuminated Manuscript page depicting a lively medieval marketplace, rich with gold leaf accents, deep blues, and reds, ornate borders
video_prompt: Subtle animation: candlelight flickering, gold leaf shimmering, slight movement of figures, elegant slow pan across the manuscript

title: Stormy Cliffs - Romanticism (AI Animated)
image_prompt: An oil painting in the style of Romanticism, depicting a solitary figure standing on a rocky cliff overlooking a vast, stormy sea with powerful waves and a dramatic, cloud-filled sky at dusk. Emotional and sublime. 19th-century influence.
video_prompt: The waves crash violently against the rocks, the clouds churn across the dark sky, and the lone figure's cloak billows in the wind. Romanticism style animation.

title: Twisted Figure - Mannerism (AI Animated)
image_prompt: An oil painting in the style of Mannerism, featuring an elongated figure in a dramatic, complex pose within an architectural space with distorted perspective and unnatural, vibrant colors. 16th-century influence.
video_prompt: The figure slowly changes their pose, the dramatic shadows shift across the distorted architecture, and the vibrant colors pulse with intensity. Mannerism style animation.

title: Majestic Valley - Hudson River School (AI Animated)
image_prompt: A classical landscape painting in the style of the Hudson River School, depicting a majestic valley at sunrise with a winding river, towering mountains, and golden light filtering through a soft mist. 19th-century influence.
video_prompt: The golden sunlight slowly spreads across the valley, the mist drifts gently between the mountains, and the river ripples softly. The style remains a 19th-century Hudson River School oil painting.

title: Study in Light - Dutch Golden Age (AI Animated)
image_prompt: A high-quality oil painting in the style of the Dutch Golden Age, reminiscent of Rembrandt. A single candle illuminates a cluttered scholar's desk with old parchments, a quill, and a glass of wine. Deep shadows, rich textures, and dramatic chiaroscuro. 17th-century influence.
video_prompt: The candlelight flickers gently, casting shifting shadows across the desk. The scholar's hand moves slightly as if writing, and the dust motes dance in the warm light. Dutch Golden Age style animation.

title: Palace Garden - Mughal Miniature (AI Animated)
image_prompt: An intricate Mughal miniature painting depicting a lush palace garden with fountains, exotic birds, and courtiers in colorful silks. Fine details, flat perspective with layered depth, and vibrant natural pigments. 16th-century Indian influence.
video_prompt: The fountains spray fine mist, the exotic birds flutter their wings and hop between branches, and the courtiers engage in quiet conversation. The intricate patterns on their silks shimmer slightly. Mughal miniature style animation.

title: River Procession - Ancient Egyptian (AI Animated)
image_prompt: A stylized wall painting in the style of Ancient Egyptian tomb art. A procession of figures carrying offerings along the Nile, with papyrus reeds and a stylized sun. Profile views, bold outlines, and earthy ochre and turquoise tones. Pharaonic era influence.
video_prompt: The figures move in a rhythmic, stylized procession. The papyrus reeds sway gently by the riverbank, and the waters of the Nile ripple under the golden sun. Ancient Egyptian wall painting style animation.

title: Garden Party - Rococo (AI Animated)
image_prompt: A classical painting in the style of Rococo, depicting a playful and ornate garden party with elegantly dressed people, delicate floral arrangements, and pastel colors. Light, airy, and decorative. 18th-century influence.
video_prompt: The garden comes to life: a gentle breeze rustles the delicate flowers, people laugh and converse in a light, playful manner, and the pastel colors shimmer in the soft sunlight. Rococo style animation.

title: Roman Forum - Neoclassicism (AI Animated)
image_prompt: A classical landscape painting in the style of the Neoclassicism movement, depicting a grand Roman forum with pristine white marble columns, statues, and a clear blue sky. Balanced composition, sharp details, and idealized beauty. 18th-century influence.
video_prompt: Sunlight slowly moves across the marble columns, shadows deepen, a gentle breeze rustles some distant banners, and birds fly across the clear blue sky. Neoclassicism style animation.

title: Urban Sunset - Ashcan School (AI Animated)
image_prompt: A classical landscape painting in the style of the Ashcan School, depicting a gritty urban scene at sunset with long shadows, earthy tones, and bold, painterly brushstrokes. 19th-century influence.
video_prompt: The city street comes to life: a horse-drawn carriage moves slowly down the cobblestones, long shadows shift as the sun sets, and distant gas lamps begin to flicker on. Ashcan School style animation.

title: Mystical Island - Symbolism (AI Animated)
image_prompt: A mystical, dreamlike landscape in the style of Symbolism art, featuring a floating island with ancient ruins, vibrant colors, soft focus, and ethereal lighting, reminiscent of Odilon Redon or Gustave Moreau.
video_prompt: The floating island gently rotates, waterfalls cascade down, clouds drift slowly across the vibrant sky, and ancient ruins glow with a soft magical light.

title: Twilight Forest - Barbizon School (AI Animated)
image_prompt: A dense, ancient forest at twilight, with mist rising from a small stream, soft golden light filtering through the trees, in the style of the Barbizon School, reminiscent of Theodore Rousseau or Jean-Francois Millet.
video_prompt: Mist swirls, leaves rustle, light changes as the sun sets, creating a moody, atmospheric landscape.

title: Decorative Garden - Arts and Crafts (AI Animated)
image_prompt: A lush, decorative garden with stylized flowers, intricate patterns, vibrant colors, birds among the branches, in the style of the Arts and Crafts Movement, reminiscent of William Morris.
video_prompt: Vines curl and grow, flowers bloom slowly, birds flutter, light flickers, creating a sense of natural movement.

title: Surreal Garden - Hieronymus Bosch (AI Animated)
image_prompt: A detailed, surreal landscape in the style of Hieronymus Bosch, filled with fantastical creatures, strange organic structures, and vibrant, unsettling colors. High resolution, intricate details.
video_prompt: The strange creatures move around, the organic structures pulse and sway, creating a lively and chaotic scene.

title: Lush Forest - Pre-Raphaelite Brotherhood (AI Animated)
image_prompt: A detailed painting in the style of the Pre-Raphaelite Brotherhood, depicting a beautiful woman in a lush, detailed forest, with vibrant colors and intricate textures.
video_prompt: The woman turns her head slowly, the wind blows through her hair and the leaves, sunlight dapples through the trees.

title: Golden Angel - Byzantine (AI Animated)
image_prompt: A grand Byzantine mosaic depicting an angel or saint, with golden tiles shimmering and a halo glowing.
video_prompt: The figure slowly raises a hand in blessing, and the golden background glimmers.

title: Woman and Flora - Art Nouveau (AI Animated)
image_prompt: A portrait of a woman surrounded by intricate floral patterns, flowing lines, muted colors, Art Nouveau style, Alphonse Mucha influence
video_prompt: The woman breathes gently, the floral patterns slowly grow and sway around her, her hair flows softly. Art Nouveau animation.

title: Stormy Sea - Romanticism (AI Animated)
image_prompt: A dramatic seascape with stormy waves crashing against cliffs, ship in the distance, dramatic lighting, Romanticism art style, oil painting texture
video_prompt: The waves crash against the cliffs, the ship rocks on the stormy sea, dramatic clouds move across the sky. Oil painting animation.

title: Mount Fuji - Ukiyo-e (AI Animated)
image_prompt: A serene landscape of Mount Fuji with cherry blossoms in the foreground, traditional Japanese village, Ukiyo-e style, woodblock print texture, detailed line work
video_prompt: The cherry blossoms gently sway in the wind, a few petals drift through the air, and the water in the river flows slowly. Ukiyo-e style animation.
